positions.detail: Up 147% — at or above 15% day-4 target. Consider taking profit.
Down -95% — stop loss triggered at -50%. Close position.
Up 152% — at or above 15% day-4 target. Consider taking profit.

agent_analysis:
## ELEVATED — Thursday Position Monitor

---

### FTNT CALL: **+147%** ✅ TARGET CRUSHED
Stock +4.0% drove this well past the 15% Thursday target. At day 4, charm has already eroded initial delta significantly — further upside from here requires continued strong momentum against accelerating theta. +147% on a weekly call with one day left is a gift. **Lock it in.**

### LULU PUT: **-95%** 🛑 STOP BLOWN
This breached the -50% hard stop and kept going. Stock moved +5.3% against a put — delta is effectively zero. This is dead money. Should have been closed at -50% per methodology. **Close immediately for whatever residual bid exists.**

### AAPL CALL: **+152%** ✅ TARGET CRUSHED
Stock +2.3% producing +152% option return — gamma amplification did its job. Same logic as FTNT: with one day to expiry, theta will burn ~4-5% of remaining premium per hour tomorrow. Holding overnight risks giving back a massive win for marginal upside. **Lock it in.**

---

### Ensemble check
Both FTNT and AAPL calls delivered outsized returns, confirming the directional thesis held through the week. LULU put was a complete miss — stock moved hard against direction. One clear loser, two massive winners. Portfolio net P&L is strongly positive despite the LULU wipeout.

---

## RECOMMENDATION

**Close all three positions NOW.**

LULU is a corpse — stop was triggered, execute the exit and stop the bleed. FTNT and AAPL at +147% and +152% are 10x the Thursday target; holding into Friday for an extra few percent while theta and charm accelerate is negative expected value. Book the wins. Two out of three at +150% with one stop-loss is an excellent week. Don't let Thursday's gifts become Friday's regrets.
